# Srangam

> Dharmic scholarship for the digital age — exploring interconnected histories of the Indian Ocean world through archaeology, epigraphy, Sanskrit sources, and deep-time geology.

Srangam is a research project publishing peer-reviewed long-form articles, cross-referenced primary sources, interactive atlases, and multilingual evidence tables on Ancient India, maritime trade networks, Sanskrit literature, and cultural continuity.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the project, featured articles, and research themes.
- [About](/about): Mission, research programme, fellowships, and partnerships.
- [Begin Journey](/begin-journey): Guided introduction to the corpus for new readers.
- [Articles](/articles): Full archive of scholarly articles with theme and language filters.
- [Search](/search): Full-text search across articles, cultural terms, and tags.
- [Reading Room](/reading-room): Curated reading lists and book compilations.
- [Sources & Method](/sources-method): Methodology, citation standards, and source hierarchy.
- [Atlas](/atlas): Interactive map of ports, routes, and cultural-exchange centres of the Indian Ocean world.
- [Maps & Data](/maps): GeoJSON datasets and visualisations.
- [Field Notes](/field-notes): Short-form observations and ongoing research notes.
- [Data Visualisation](/data-visualization): Correlation matrices and network graphs.
- [Research Network](/research-network): Collaborator and institution network.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap): Human-readable site index.

## Themes

- [Ancient India](/themes/ancient-india): Vedic, epic, and early-historic India.
- [Indian Ocean World](/themes/indian-ocean-world): Maritime trade, ports, and diasporic exchange.
- [Scripts & Inscriptions](/themes/scripts-inscriptions): Epigraphy from Brahmi to Grantha.
- [Geology & Deep Time](/themes/geology-deep-time): Geomythology and paleo-landscape evidence.
- [Empires & Exchange](/themes/empires-exchange): Polities, treaties, and trade-network histories.

## Sources

- [Edicts](/sources/edicts): Ashokan and successor edicts.
- [Epigraphy](/sources/epigraphy): Inscriptions across South and Southeast Asia.
- [Trade Documents](/sources/trade-docs): Periplus, Tamil Sangam, and Arab traveller accounts.
- [Sanskrit Terminology](/sources/sanskrit-terminology): Glossary of dharmic and technical terms.

## Tools

- [Sanskrit Translator](/sanskrit-translator): Pāṇinian-grounded Sanskrit ↔ English pipeline.
- [Jyotish Horoscope](/jyotish): Vedanga Jyotisha as mathematical astronomy and chronology.

## Optional

- [Partnership](/partnership): Institutional collaboration enquiries.
- [Support Research](/support-research): Fellowship and patron information.
- [Research Submission](/research-submission): Submit work for editorial review.
- [Brand](/brand): Visual identity and citation guidelines.
